title: Transportation Engineering
outline: This course aims to provide students with an understanding of the fundamentals of road engineering and traffic analysis by providing a grounding in techniques for: (1) the geometric design of roads, freeways and intersections, including road drainage; (2) the design of pavements; (3) traffic engineering design (3) (multi -modal) capacity analysis of traffic facilities, including for public transport and Non-Motorized Transportation (NMT); and (4) management and control of traffic flows (both urban roads, rural roads and highways), including road pricing.
lecture_times: See departmental timetable and official class schedule.
dp_requirements: Please refer to the official course handout document for detailed information regarding the DP requirements for this course.
assessment: Please refer to the official course handout document regarding the assessment criteria for this course.
